elements.original_description: A person holding a credit card, ready to make a purchase, with a shopping bag in the background.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a person's hand holding a credit card, poised as if ready to make a purchase, with a stylish shopping bag visible in the background. Cinematic lighting with soft bokeh, sharp focus on the card, realistic textures, and a neutral, aspirational mood. High resolution, professional composition.
